problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: The key to What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? is Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species — specifically Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
